exercises.prompt: Show the top 10 Pokémon by total stats — name and total, highest first. Break ties alphabetically by name.
exercises.referenceSql: SELECT name, total FROM pokemon ORDER BY total DESC, name LIMIT 10
hints: You need a sort (highest first) and a way to keep only the first ten rows.
To break ties alphabetically, add a second sort column: ORDER BY total DESC, name.

```sql
SELECT name, total FROM pokemon ORDER BY total DESC, name LIMIT 10
```

exercises.prompt: Find the 5 heaviest Pokémon — name and weight_kg, heaviest first (ties alphabetical by name).
exercises.referenceSql: SELECT name, weight_kg FROM pokemon ORDER BY weight_kg DESC, name LIMIT 5
hints: Same shape as the last exercise, but sorting on weight_kg.
ORDER BY weight_kg DESC, name — then LIMIT 5.

```sql
SELECT name, weight_kg FROM pokemon ORDER BY weight_kg DESC, name LIMIT 5
```
